title: Fix :let on <.link> and <.form> usage
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/live/let_example_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.LetExampleLive). Use <.form :let={f} for={@form} phx-change="validate">...<.input field={f[:name]} />.... The :let binding must expose the form struct as `f` inside the block. Also use @form[:name] outside the let context in a separate

Name field: {@form[:name].value}

. mount/3 builds @form via to_form(%{"name" => ""}).
tier_rationale: The :let pattern on function components is an often-missed HEEx feature.
